camera.source: lerobot pi05_libero config — two camera keys under 'observation' prefix, not DROID keys

prompt_format.value: <task instruction as plain text>  # pi0.5 uses PaliGemma + tokenizer
prompt_format.source: lerobot Pi0.5 forward path — tokenizer.apply_chat_template on raw instruction

image_flip_180deg.source: LIBERO agentview is upside-down relative to training; feedback_lerobot_libero_flip.md — pi0/pi0.5 both require flip

resize_method.source: lerobot image processor default (distinct from OpenVLA's lanczos3)

image_resize_before_model.source: lerobot image_processor resizes 256→224 inside processor pipeline

center_crop.source: lerobot pi0.5 preprocessor_config: no do_center_crop flag; resize only

gripper_post_processing.value: state uses 8D (7 joint + 1 gripper); action gripper follows LIBERO convention (-1=open, +1=close) without extra binarize
gripper_post_processing.source: feedback_openpi_libero_vs_droid_obs.md — pi05_libero needs 8D state + observation/image keys, not DROID 7D+state

wait_steps.source: LIBERO eval standard: 10 zero-action settle steps

obs_wrapper.source: openpi server consumes flat dict (not EnvTransition); tokenization handled in server
